ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "closed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the store is closed */,
  "pharmacy_closed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the pharmacy is closed */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the store (e.g., open, closed, under renovation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the store record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the store record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the store type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the store type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the store type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pharmacy_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pharmacy service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the pharmacy service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pharmacy service */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the pharmacy service is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the staff member works */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the staff member (e.g., pharmacist, technician) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the staff record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the staff record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_staff_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_store_types" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_pharmacy_services" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pharmacy service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id", "service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale was made */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the product is stored */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_chain" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being supplied */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store receiving the supply */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date of delivery */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the supply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supply chain record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supply chain record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_chain_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_chain_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES inventory ("product_id")
)
